agent_assessment.rationale: The text clearly states the modulated signal and asks for the demodulator output, while the image provides the necessary demodulator details: multiplication by cos(2π(fc+40)t) and an ideal LPF with cutoff 510 Hz. Despite modest resolution, the figure is readable enough to understand the task and expected answer.
